title: Add contact phone number to the site

requirements.summary: Display the phone number 8130422230 as a clickable contact link in the site footer
acceptanceCriteria: The phone number 8130422230 is visible in the footer.
The phone number is rendered as a clickable `tel:` link.
Tapping the link on mobile initiates a phone call to 8130422230.
The styling is consistent with the existing footer design.

file_operations.description: Add a clickable phone number link (tel:8130422230) in the brand info section of the footer, styled consistently with existing footer elements to display the contact number 8130422230.
